# ACT Plus Digital Solutions

> Enterprise digital transformation partner headquartered in Ramallah, Palestine — delivering IT strategy, engineering, cybersecurity and managed services across MENA.

ACT Plus Digital Solutions is an enterprise IT consulting and digital transformation company. We operate as a single, accountable delivery partner across strategy, software engineering, cybersecurity, and specialist services — serving leading organisations in Palestine, Jordan, Iraq, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt and the wider MENA region.

## Services

- Digital Transformation Strategy
- Custom Software & Platform Engineering
- Cybersecurity & SOC (Security Operations Centre)
- Managed IT Services
- Data & Analytics
- Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
- UI/UX Design & Product Development

## Key Clients

Paltel, Jawwal, Palestine Monetary Authority, Bank of Palestine, The World Bank, PCBS, Ministry of Telecommunications & Digital Economy, AlQuds Pharmaceuticals, GIZ, Munib & Angela Masri Foundation, Upliftt, BK Plus Europe, Reach.

## Pages

- [Home](https://actplusds.com/): Overview, services, client logos, and call to action
- [Services](https://actplusds.com/services.html): Full service catalogue with details
- [About](https://actplusds.com/about.html): Our story, mission, values and team
- [Partners](https://actplusds.com/partners.html): Partner and vendor programme
- [Blog](https://actplusds.com/blog.html): Insights on digital transformation and enterprise IT
- [Contact](https://actplusds.com/contact.html): Get in touch or book a consultation

## Offices

- Ramallah, Palestine (HQ)
- Gaza, Palestine
- Amman, Jordan
- Baghdad & Erbil, Iraq
- Dubai, UAE
- Toronto, Canada
